comment: Default-FAIL verification contract. Every check starts at passes=false. A check may be flipped to true only after its verification command ran and the evidence file (log, report, or screenshot path relative to the repository root) was inspected. check-contract.(sh|ps1) refuses Done while any required check fails. Checks with required:false that have passes=false must carry a non-empty waiver_reason explaining why the check does not apply.

checks.waiver_reason: Non-code stack (docs): this task's outputs are a Markdown skill definition (SKILL.md) and a Pester test file. There is no compiled/linted-language toolchain in scope for this task per specs/sdd-domain/tasks.md Global Constraints (stack: docs).
Non-code stack (docs): no typed-language source is produced by this task (Markdown skill definition only); typecheck does not apply.

domain-reverse has no execution path reachable yet (not wired into the public entry skill until T-004 per tasks.md); there is no integration surface to exercise beyond the unit/acceptance Pester suite already covering the fixture end-to-end conversion.
